info.title: Beauty Service API
info.description: Aggregate Service API — платформа бронирования услуг мастеров (b2c marketplace).

get.description:
Get database connection pool metrics.

Returns pool utilization, checkout count, and other stats.
Requires admin role in production.

post.description:
Refresh access token.

Reads refresh token from HTTP-only cookie (preferred) or request body (fallback).
Returns new access token in body. New refresh token is set in HTTP-only cookie.

put.description: Switch user context to a different role with full token invalidation.

get.description:
Get current user profile, creating if not exists.

Args:
    current_user: Authenticated user context
    profile_service: Profile service instance

Returns:
    ProfileResponse with profile data

Composite endpoint for provider detail page.

Returns provider + services + favorite status in one request.
Replaces 3 separate API calls from the mobile client.
Favorite status is included only when authenticated.

Get active services for a provider (public endpoint).

Returns only active services with i18n title/description and category info.
200: Provider found (with services or empty list)
404: Provider not found
Check if provider is in user's favorites.

post.description:
Find providers who have available slots within the specified time window
    and offer all the requested services.

    Results can be sorted by:
    - rating: Highest rated providers first (default)
    - price: Lowest total price first

Pre-validate selected services before booking.

    Returns:
    - is_valid: Whether all services can be booked together
    - is_combinable: Whether all services are combinable
    - services: List of services with details
    - totals: Total duration and price
    - warnings: Any validation warnings
Upload an image to provider's portfolio. Max 50 images per provider.

get.description: Get all portfolio images for the current provider.
Get all portfolio images for a specific provider. Public endpoint.

delete.description: Delete an image from provider's portfolio.

post.description:
Creates a new booking request for a provider in PENDING status.

    **Business Rules:**
    - Client role required
    - Start time must be in future
    - Slot must be available (no conflicts)
    - Max 30 days in advance
    - Min 1 service, max 10 services
    - All services must belong to provider

    **Status Flow:**
    - New booking → PENDING
    - Provider confirms → CONFIRMED
    - Or expires after 24 hours → EXPIRED

    **Security:**
    - User ID from JWT token (SEC-001)
    - Role-based access control
    - Rate limited to 10 per hour per IP

get.description:
Returns full information about a booking.

    **Security:**
    - Client or Provider only (ownership validation)
    - User ID from JWT token (SEC-001)

patch.description:
Confirms a booking, changing status from PENDING to CONFIRMED.

    **Business Rules:**
    - Provider role required
    - Status must be PENDING
    - Only provider who owns the booking
    - Sets confirmed_at and confirmed_by

    **Notifications:**
    - Email sent to client (future)

422.description: Cannot confirm booking in current status

patch.description:
Cancels a booking with business rule validation.

    **Cancellation Policy:**
    - **Client:** min 2 hours before start_time
    - **Provider:** can cancel anytime (log.log reason)
    - Status must be PENDING or CONFIRMED
    - Sets cancelled_at, cancelled_by, cancellation_reason

    **Notifications:**
    - Email sent to other party (future)

422.description: Cannot cancel booking in current status

patch.description:
Reschedules a booking to a new time.

    **Rescheduling Policy:**
    - **Client:** min 2 hours before start_time
    - **Provider:** can reschedule anytime
    - Status must be CONFIRMED
    - Max 3 reschedules per booking
    - New slot must be available

    **Database:**
    - Creates record in booking_reschedule_history
    - Increments reschedule_count

Marks a booking as COMPLETED.

    **Business Rules:**
    - Provider role required
    - Status must be CONFIRMED
    - Only after end_time has passed
    - Enables review creation for client

    **Next Steps:**
    - Client can create review
    - Provider's stats updated

422.description: Cannot complete booking in current status

patch.description:
Marks a booking as NO_SHOW when client doesn't appear.

    **Business Rules:**
    - Provider role required
    - Status must be CONFIRMED or IN_PROGRESS
    - Only the booking's provider can mark no-show
    - Records no_show_marked_at/by timestamps

    **Impact:**
    - Booking status → NO_SHOW
    - Client's no_show_count incremented (Phase 2)
    - May affect client's Trust Score (Phase 2)

    **Security:**
    - Provider ownership validated
    - User ID from JWT (SEC-001)

403.description: Only the booking's provider can mark no-show

422.description: Cannot mark no-show in current status

get.description:
Returns list of available slots for a provider on a specific date or date range.

    **Slot Generation:**
    - Based on provider's schedule rules (weekday + time range)
    - Slot duration = sum of service durations or explicit override
    - Excludes: past slots, booked slots, non-working days

    **Query Parameters:**
    - `providerId`: UUID of the provider (providers.id)
    - `fromDate`: Required. Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - `toDate`: Optional. End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to fromDate (single day).
    - `serviceIds`: Comma-separated service UUIDs for duration calculation
    - `duration_minutes`: Override slot duration (optional)

    **Rate Limit:** 30 requests per minute per IP

get.summary: Check if booking can be reviewed
get.description: Check if client can review a booking.

delete.description:
Delete provider service.

Uses ActiveBookingCheckerProtocol for cross-feature communication
with Booking feature (ARCH-004 compliance).

post.description:
Create a new review for a completed booking.

* **booking_id**: ID of the completed booking
* **rating**: Rating from 1 to 5
* **comment**: Optional review comment (max 2000 chars)
* **service_ids**: Optional list of service IDs being reviewed

Note: provider_id is automatically extracted from the booking.

patch.description:
Update an existing review.

Only the review author can update the review.

delete.description:
Delete a review (soft delete).

Only the review author can delete the review.

get.description:
Get all reviews for a provider with rating statistics.

provider_id: providers.id from catalog

Get aggregated review statistics for a provider.

provider_id: providers.id from catalog

post.description:
Verify Firebase token and authenticate or require linking.

Android flow:
1. User signs in with Google/Apple via Firebase SDK
2. App receives Firebase token
3. App calls this endpoint
4. Backend verifies token and either:
   - Creates new user and returns tokens (201)
   - Returns existing user tokens (200)
   - Returns link_required if email exists (200)

Link Firebase account to existing user with password verification.

Android flow (after verify returns link_required):
1. App shows "Enter password" dialog
2. User enters password
3. App calls this endpoint with {firebase_token, password}
4. Backend verifies password and links Firebase account
5. Backend returns tokens

delete.description:
Unlink Firebase account from user.

User must have at least one auth method remaining (password or other Firebase).

get.description: List all Firebase accounts linked to current user.
